---
title: 'Being Still | The Missing Element In Most Prayers'
date: '2014-12-03T14:31:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6395350876961348880'
blogger_filename: '/2014/12/being-still-missing-element-in-most.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Keys To Success'
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<br /><br /><br /><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/attribution-stillness-by-christian-rudman-e9555ba0a3ba.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/attribution-stillness-by-christian-rudman-e9555ba0a3ba.jpg" height="400" width="270" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Attribution: <a href="https://flic.kr/p/oTHLVz" target="_blank">Stillness by Christian.Rudman</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /><h3>How often are we ever, really, still? </h3><blockquote class="tr_bq"><h4><a href="http://biblehub.com/psalms/46-10.htm" target="_blank">Psalms 46:10</a></h4><br /><span class="versiontext"><a href="http://biblehub.com/nlt/psalms/46.htm">New Living Translation</a></span><br />"Be still, and know that I am God! I will be honored by every nation. I will be honored throughout the world."<span class="p"><br /></span><br /><br /><span class="versiontext"><a href="http://biblehub.com/hcsb/psalms/46.htm">Holman Christian Standard Bible</a></span><br />Stop your fighting--and know that I am God, exalted among the nations, exalted on the earth." <span class="p"><br /></span><br /><br /><span class="versiontext"><a href="http://biblehub.com/net/psalms/46.htm">NET Bible</a></span><br />He  says, "Stop your striving and recognize that I am God! I will be  exalted over the nations! I will be exalted over the earth!" <span class="p"><br /></span><br /><br /><span class="versiontext"><a href="http://biblehub.com/gwt/psalms/46.htm">GOD'S WORDÂ® Translation</a></span><br />Let go [of your concerns]! Then you will know that I am God. I rule the nations. I rule the earth.<span class="p"><br /></span></blockquote>I've written before about <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank">Being Still,</a> which in itself was sparked my Michael Hyatt's great article "T<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/the-practice-of-stillness.html" target="_blank">he Practice of Stillness</a>". I've been trying to practice this, off and on, since I first wrote about this in April of this year, 2014.<br /><br />I find stillness difficult. My mind racing with so many ideas and thoughts. The first few that come to me I want to stop being still and start writing and blogging about them. I've had to learn to keep a note pad with me, and just jot the basic essence of thought down and go back to "being still". <br /><br />I got more practice with this at Gateway - Freedom Ministries - <a href="http://gatewaypeople.com/ministries/freedom-kairos/faqs-0" target="_blank">Kairos </a>event. It's hard to describe how great that two days was. It was a total reset. Of course, in the following weeks, I've had normal life ensure, and I have to make the choice if I'm going to use some of the new tools I learned at Kairos to continue honing my practice of Being Still. I journaled some of those keys <a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2014/12/kairos-notes.html" target="_blank">HERE</a>. <br /><br />I read <a href="https://www.bible.com/bible/1/2ki.1.kjv" target="_blank">2 Kings</a>, chapters 1-5 this morning, and it dawned on me.... David practiced this stillness. Even though he was known for being a man of war and action, he did this. He stopped, and asked God for direction, and then WAITED for an answer before taking action.<br /><br />Then it dawned on me, "How often do we EVER be still and know that He is God?" When is the last time you literally stopped ALL physical AND mental activity for five straight minutes and just got real still inside? <br /><br /><br />That' my encouragement for you today, go back and read my article and Michael Hyatt's article linked above if you want more instructions on how. But go get still before God. Set a timer for 5 minutes, 10, 15 maybe? And just get still inside long enough for His still small voice to start being heard. <br /><br />Here is a song to meditate on regarding this: Link <a href="http://youtu.be/jVqntO1_Qxg" target="_blank">HERE</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="//www.youtube.com/embed/jVqntO1_Qxg" width="420"></iframe> <br /><br /><br /><br />In other words... will I #<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a>? <br /><br /><br />---<br /><h4>And now I leave you with a question:</h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>What do you think about Stillness, when was the last time YOU were still, really still?</b></blockquote><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;">To Respond Leave A Comment on This Post</span><br /><br /><h4><div><script src="https://apis.google.com/js/plusone.js"></script><g:plus action="share"></g:plus></div></h4><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a><br /><br /></div><div><h4><br /><span style="font-weight: bold;">This Weeks Resource:</span></h4><div><ul><li><a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/0883687305/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=0883687305&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=3BFJVIAX35BOFKTJ">Grace: The Power To Change, Dr Jim Richards</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=0883687305" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" /> </li></ul><br /><iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="//ws-na.amazon-adsystem.com/widgets/q?ServiceVersion=20070822&amp;OneJS=1&amp;Operation=GetAdHtml&amp;MarketPlace=US&amp;source=ss&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;ad_type=product_link&amp;tracking_id=your0f4d-20&amp;marketplace=amazon&amp;region=US&amp;placement=0883687305&amp;asins=0883687305&amp;linkId=ELKK4KX533GMNN52&amp;show_border=true&amp;link_opens_in_new_window=true" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br /><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16px;">Affiliate Disclosure:</span></i></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16px;">I earn&nbsp;commissions&nbsp;off of some of my suggestions.&nbsp;</span></i><i style="line-height: 16px;">Full Disclaimers (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i><br /><i>See my Store for more suggestions (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i></span></div><div>- <br /><br /><!-- Begin MailChimp Signup Form --><link href="//cdn-images.mailchimp.com/embedcode/slim-081711.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"></link><style type="text/css"> #mc_embed_signup{background:#fff; clear:left; font:14px Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;  width:200px;}  /* Add your own MailChimp form style overrides in your site stylesheet or in this style block.     We recommend moving this block and the preceding CSS link to the HEAD of your HTML file. */ </style><br /><div id="mc_embed_signup"><form action="//darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank"><label for="mce-EMAIL">Subscribe By Email</label> <input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" placeholder="email address" required="" type="email" /> <!-- real people should not fill this in and expect good things - do not remove this or risk form bot signups--><br /><div style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;"><input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" /></div><div class="clear"><input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div></form></div><!--End mc_embed_signup--><br /><br /><br /></div></div><br /><br />
